title: Wanderlust
description: Wanderlust is more than just a mod; it's a vision for a deeper, more immersive Minecraft experience. This mod introduces a vast array of new content, including unique biomes, exciting items, and challenging mobs. But Wanderlust doesn't stop there.
body:
![Logo from Wanderlust Neo Frontier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4584e0b984a7a20d63f826f975bffd91007c7d26_0.webp)
A New Chapter

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MN5A8L20qgQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Wanderlust started as a small idea to make Minecraft more fun. Now, it's grown into a big project with lots of exciting features! We're really happy to share the official, long-term version of Wanderlust with you all.

![Spoiler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94b7a5baee5f88bd5d9ed121cd5fa48db686b18a.jpeg)

One of the coolest things about Wanderlust is the way the world looks and feels. Thanks to the amazing work of Noisium (thanks Steveplays28 and Builderb0y!), we've optimized the world generation to make it faster and smoother. This means you can explore vast landscapes and discover hidden secrets without any lag.

![Its on!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/512ad1e07ceaa321f4e405f298493f2cdb22197c.jpeg)
eg)

Wanderlust introduces a bunch of new creatures, both friendly and fierce. You'll meet adorable animals, challenging monsters, and even some mysterious beings. And don't forget to craft powerful gear to help you on your adventures!

![spoiler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/137fd86b6ed29348ef6b9dbe0609a446256167af.jpeg)

We're always working hard to make Wanderlust even better. In the future, you can look forward to:

New Worlds: Explore exciting new dimensions filled with wonder and danger.
Exciting Gameplay: Experience new ways to play Minecraft with complex crafting systems and challenging puzzles.
Endless Possibilities: Customize your adventure with a variety of options.

Join the Wanderlust Community

We're so grateful for the amazing community that has grown around Wanderlust. We hope you'll join us on this adventure and help shape the future of the mod. Stay tuned for updates and let's create some unforgettable memories together!

Portal Frame 

![Portal fram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ede0971e4b2196c24b3c6431f4c77877ac7042d_0.webp)

In light of unforeseen personal circumstances, I will prioritize the maintenance and development of the Neo Forge version at the moment. The next update, incorporating new features and improvements, is planned for a Christmas 2024 release.
